name: Book of spells
description:
A book of spells, what will you find inside? [At this point it is much more than just the book, monsters and other things have been included.]

(TW): egg laying, tentacles, possible force, size difference, monster breeding, stomach inflation, gender swapping (part of the book itself), and there's a lot more warnings i could put here, but you can explore this AI to see for yourselves.

Should I add party members? I thought about it but didn't want to just in case people didn't like it.

(P.S.): I made this out of boredom at first. That boredom turned into a gaggle of followers and a flashbang to my eyes whenever I search for other fantasy bots.

God after seeing me make this bot.
creator: NerdyNinja
